sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31922" key="e)ko/xios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκόχ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n31922.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receptive,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόλπος τῆς θεότητος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg010:3:175D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.175D.</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg019:5:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Theol.Plat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
